mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgRcptnAgreDAO.selectRcptnAgreCnt 설 명 : 알림수신동의 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON S.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE S.DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : MsgRcptnAgreDAO.selectRcptnAgreList 설 명 : 알림수신동의 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM ( SELECT S.SBJCT_YR , S.SBJCT_SMSTR , O.ORGNM , D.DEPTNM , S.SBJCTNM , S.DVCLAS_NO , U.USER_TYCD , U.USER_RPRS_ID , U.STDNT_NO , U.USERNM , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS MBL_PHN , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS EML , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 4, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PUSH_RCVYN , U.SHRTNT_ALIM_RCVYN , U.EML_ALIM_RCVYN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 6, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ALIM_TALK_RCVYN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 1, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SMS_RCVYN FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON S.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON D.ORG_ID = O.ORG_ID WHERE S.DELYN = 'N'
ORDER BY S.SBJCT_YR DESC, S.SBJCT_SMSTR ASC, S.SBJCTNM ASC, U.USERNM ASC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

/* SQL ID : MsgRcptnAgreDAO.selectRcptnAgreExcelList 설 명 : 알림수신동의 엑셀 목록 조회 */ SELECT S.SBJCT_YR , S.SBJCT_SMSTR , O.ORGNM , D.DEPTNM , S.SBJCTNM , S.DVCLAS_NO , U.USER_TYCD , U.USER_RPRS_ID , U.STDNT_NO , U.USERNM , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS MBL_PHN , (SELECT MAX(UC.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND UC.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS EML , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 4, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PUSH_RCVYN , U.SHRTNT_ALIM_RCVYN , U.EML_ALIM_RCVYN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 6, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ALIM_TALK_RCVYN , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NVL(U.PUSH_TALK_SMS_FLAG, '0000000000'), 1, 1) = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SMS_RCVYN FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON S.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON D.ORG_ID = O.ORG_ID WHERE S.DELYN = 'N'
ORDER BY S.SBJCT_YR DESC, S.SBJCT_SMSTR ASC, S.SBJCTNM ASC, U.USERNM ASC
